title: The alive glider
description: Retextures and remodels the "glider" furniture on the Origin realms Minecraft server
body:
This pack is a simple redo of the glider furniture in the Origin Realms Minecraft server. This is just my rendition of what the glider may have looked like eons ago, and if you object to any of the changes and stylistic choices I've made, I implore you to make your own pack instead.



WILL NEED SPU
https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker/version/1.6
